nasb.text: Indeed, He will speak to this people Through stammering lips and a foreign tongue,

esv.text: For by people of strange lips and with a foreign tongue the Lord will speak to this people,

cnv.text: 耶和華要藉著外族人的嘴唇和外族人的舌頭， 對這人民說話。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华必用外族人的口和语言来教训他们。

csbs.text: 耶和华就是要藉着结结巴巴的嘴和异族人的舌对这子民说话
